title: General Academic Calendar
content:
Academic Calendar 2024-2025
Morgan State University

---

FALL 2024

August:
- New Student Orientation
- Classes Begin
- Last day to add/drop courses

September:
- Labor Day (University Closed)
- Last day to withdraw with "W" grade (check specific date)

October:
- Fall Break
- Midterm grades due
- Advising for Spring registration begins

November:
- Spring 2025 Registration begins
- Thanksgiving Break

December:
- Last day of classes
- Final Exams
- Commencement
- Winter Break begins

---

SPRING 2025

January:
- Martin Luther King Jr. Day (University Closed)
- Classes Begin
- Last day to add/drop courses

February:
- Last day to withdraw with "W" grade (check specific date)

March:
- Spring Break
- Midterm grades due
- Advising for Fall registration begins

April:
- Fall 2025 Registration begins
- Last day of classes

May:
- Final Exams
- Commencement

---

SUMMER 2025

- Multiple summer sessions available
- Check academic calendar for specific dates
- Registration deadlines vary by session

---

IMPORTANT DEADLINES TO REMEMBER

- Tuition payment deadlines
- Financial aid priority dates
- Housing application deadlines
- Course withdrawal deadlines
- Graduation application deadlines

---

OFFICIAL CALENDAR

For the most current and detailed academic calendar, visit:
https://www.morgan.edu/academic-calendar

Note: Dates are subject to change. Always verify important dates on the official university calendar.
